name: Mitsuko Yokoyama
alt_names: Rube Goldberg Klutz (ピタゴラドジっ娘)
description:
__Height__: 155 cm

Mitsuko is a student at Hachimitsu Academy and the secretary of the aboveground Student Council. She becomes the love interest of [Takehito Morokuzu](https://anilist.co/character/64851)—better known as Gakuto—and is the cousin of [Anzu Yokoyama](https://anilist.co/character/89755/). She is a very clumsy girl who also has an interest in the Three Kingdoms.
